name: Rentec Direct Property Management API
what_it_does: Rentec Direct REST API for property management software for independent landlords and property managers. Enables AI agents to manage property and unit records, handle tenant applications and screening, process rent collection and payment tracking, manage lease agreements and renewals, handle maintenance request workflows, access accounting and financial reporting, retrieve tenant communication records, manage vendor and contractor data, and integrate property data with accounting systems and tenant portals.
use_cases: Managing property and tenant records from landlord management agents
Processing rent collection and payment tracking from financial automation agents
Handling maintenance request workflows from property operations agents
Retrieving financial reports from property accounting agents
not_for: Commercial property management without residential rental focus
Large enterprise REIT without independent landlord and small property manager focus
Short-term rental management without long-term lease workflows
best_when: An independent landlord or property management company using Rentec Direct wants AI agents to automate tenant management, rent collection, maintenance, accounting, and lease renewal workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Tenant PII including application data, credit history, and payment records is highly sensitive. Tenant screening data has Fair Housing Act implications. Automated communication must comply with state landlord-tenant law.

auth.notes: Rentec Direct uses API key authentication. Account-level credentials. No granular scope control. Limited public developer documentation. REST API for integrations with third-party tools. Strong independent landlord focus.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free for up to 10 units; paid plans for larger portfolios
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-unit pricing; PM Edition for property managers
pricing.notes: Grants Pass, Oregon. Founded 2007. Used by 15,000+ landlords and property managers managing 500,000+ units. Independent landlord and small PM focus. Competes with Buildium and AppFolio for residential property management. Strong accounting features for independent landlords.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; contact for specifics

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Tenant PII, credit history, and payment data — Fair Housing Act compliance required
No public MCP server — API key with limited documentation
No webhooks — polling required for maintenance and payment updates
No granular scopes — API key grants full account access
Tenant screening data has Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) compliance requirements
State landlord-tenant law varies significantly — automated communications need state-specific compliance
agent_readiness.security_notes: Tenant PII and financial data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. API key only. US data residency. Fair Housing Act and FCRA compliance for tenant data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Tenant PII and payment data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. API key only. US data residency. FCRA and Fair Housing compliance.
